name: On Sly Waters
description:
“You're not someone important, are you?”

[adorable bath house cat]

.

Peace is a thing to treasure in such a public place like the bath house. Especially if the bath house is another home outside of home. To Ossen, the quietness that lives in this early morning is something that he'll have to take advantage of, as if he didn't already have enough special treatment. But he'll have to keep himself company with another early presence.

[Avatar Source: I couldn't find the artist...]
creator: shokokokok
